languages.text: "Вы ослеплены своими отцовскими чувствами, словно старый дурак. Пойдемте, я открою вам глаза на правду".

traits.locale_text: "Вы ослеплены своими отцовскими чувствами, словно старый дурак. Пойдемте, я открою вам глаза на правду".

languages.text: "You are blinded by your fatherly feelings like an old fool. Come, and I shall open your eyes to the truth."
languages.original_text: "Вы ослеплены своими отцовскими чувствами, словно старый дурак. Пойдемте, я открою вам глаза на правду".

traits.locale_text: "You are blinded by your fatherly feelings like an old fool. Come, and I shall open your eyes to the truth."
"You are blinded by your fatherly feelings like an old fool. Come, and I shall open your eyes to the truth."
"You are blinded by your fatherly feelings like an old fool. Come, and I shall open your eyes to the truth."

languages.text: "Ihr seid wie ein alter Narr von Euren väterlichen Gefühlen geblendet. Kommt, und ich werde Euch die Augen öffnen."
languages.original_text: "You are blinded by your fatherly feelings like an old fool. Come, and I shall open your eyes to the truth."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid wie ein alter Narr von Euren väterlichen Gefühlen geblendet. Kommt, und ich werde Euch die Augen öffnen."

languages.text: “你被父爱蒙蔽了双眼，活像个老糊涂。来吧，我会让你看清真相。”
languages.original_text: "You are blinded by your fatherly feelings like an old fool. Come, and I shall open your eyes to the truth."

traits.locale_text: “你被父爱蒙蔽了双眼，活像个老糊涂。来吧，我会让你看清真相。”

languages.text: « Votre amour paternel vous aveugle, vieillard. Laissez-moi vous ouvrir les yeux. »
languages.original_text: "You are blinded by your fatherly feelings like an old fool. Come, and I shall open your eyes to the truth."

traits.locale_text: « Votre amour paternel vous aveugle, vieillard. Laissez-moi vous ouvrir les yeux. »

languages.text: «Se ha dejado cegar por sus sentimientos paternos como un viejo necio. Venga, que le voy a abrir los ojos».
languages.original_text: "You are blinded by your fatherly feelings like an old fool. Come, and I shall open your eyes to the truth."

traits.locale_text: «Se ha dejado cegar por sus sentimientos paternos como un viejo necio. Venga, que le voy a abrir los ojos».

languages.text: "Baba şefkatin yüzünden aptal ihtiyarlar gibi kör olmuşsun. Gel, gözlerini gerçeğe açayım."
languages.original_text: "You are blinded by your fatherly feelings like an old fool. Come, and I shall open your eyes to the truth."

traits.locale_text: "Baba şefkatin yüzünden aptal ihtiyarlar gibi kör olmuşsun. Gel, gözlerini gerçeğe açayım."

languages.text: 「父としての情に目が眩んで、老いぼれのように愚かになっている。さあ、真実を目覚めさせよう。」
languages.original_text: "You are blinded by your fatherly feelings like an old fool. Come, and I shall open your eyes to the truth."

traits.locale_text: 「父としての情に目が眩んで、老いぼれのように愚かになっている。さあ、真実を目覚めさせよう。」
